revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:山車会館]]
'''Float Exhibition Halls''' (山車会館) are exhibition halls or museums dedicated to showcasing [[Matsuri float|festival floats]] (山車, 屋台, 曳山, 山鉾) used in various [[:en:Festivals|Festivals]] across Japan, as well as introducing the history and traditions of these festivals.
== Float Exhibition Halls Across Japan ==
* {{ill|Esashi Oiwake Hall and Esashi Float Hall|ja|江差追分会館・江差山車会館|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Esashi Oiwake Hall and Esashi Float Hall|1=Esashi Oiwake Museum and Esashi Yama Museum|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q48748731}} - {{ill|Esashi, Hiyama District, Hokkaido|ja|檜山郡江差町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Esashi, Hiyama District, Hokkaido|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Hokkaido * {{ill|Numata Town Night Light Hall|ja|沼田町夜高会館|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Numata Town Night Light Hall|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - {{ill|Numata, Sorachi Subprefecture|ja|空知総合振興局沼田町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Numata, Sorachi Subprefecture|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Hokkaido * {{ill|Nebuta Museum Wa Rasse|en|Nebuta Museum Wa Rasse|qid=Q11275091|lt=Nebuta House Warasse|1=Nebuta Museum Wa Rasse}} - {{ill|Aomori|en|Aomori|qid=Q146790|lt=Aomori, Aomori|1=Aomori}}, Aomori Prefecture * {{ill|Tsugaru Domain Neputa Village|ja|津軽藩ねぷた村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsugaru Domain Neputa Village|1=Tsugaru-han Neputa Village|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11556435}} - {{ill|Hirosaki|en|Hirosaki|qid=Q194087|lt=Hirosaki, Aomori|1=Hirosaki}}, Aomori Prefecture * {{ill|Tachineputa Museum|en|Tachineputa Museum|qid=Q11597769|lt=Tachineputa Museum|1=Tachineputa Museum}} - {{ill|Goshogawara|en|Goshogawara|qid=Q496702|lt=Goshogawara, Aomori|1=Goshogawara}}, Aomori Prefecture * {{ill|Shinjo Furusato History Center (Float Exhibition Hall)|ja|新庄ふるさと歴史センター（山車会館）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinjo Furusato History Center (Float Exhibition Hall)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - {{ill|Shinjō, Yamagata|en|Shinjō, Yamagata|qid=Q840603|lt=Shinjo, Yamagata|1=Shinjō, Yamagata}}, Yamagata Prefecture * {{ill|Carved Float Exhibition Hall|ja|彫刻屋台展示館|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Carved Float Exhibition Hall|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (in {{ill|Central Park of the Town of Floats|ja|屋台のまち中央公園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Central Park of the Town of Floats|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) - {{ill|Kanuma, Tochigi|en|Kanuma, Tochigi|qid=Q390792|lt=Kanuma, Tochigi|1=Kanuma, Tochigi}}, Tochigi Prefecture * {{ill|Tochigi Float Hall|ja|とちぎ山車会館|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tochigi Float Hall|1=Tochigi Float Hall|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q100549885}} - {{ill|Tochigi (city)|en|Tochigi (city)|qid=Q44830|lt=Tochigi, Tochigi|1=Tochigi (city)}}, Tochigi Prefecture * {{ill|Suigo Sawara Float Hall|ja|水郷佐原山車会館|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suigo Sawara Float Hall|1=Suigō Sawara Festival Float Museum|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11549309}} -
